Task instruction sent to agent 
# Fix Plan Renderer Crash on Null-to-Unknown Attribute Update

**Repository:** hashicorp/terraform
**Difficulty:** MEDIUM
**Category:** cross_module_bug_fix

## Description

Terraform's plan renderer crashes when displaying a resource update where a computed attribute transitions from `null` to `(known after apply)`. The crash occurs because the renderer in `unknown.go` assumes that if the action is not `plans.Create`, the `renderer.before.Renderer` field is always non-nil. However, a provider can return `null` for a computed attribute on the current state and then declare it will recompute the attribute as part of the update. In this case, `before.Renderer` is nil even though the action is `plans.Update`, causing a nil pointer dereference.

A second related issue is in `block.go`, where unknown blocks during an update are always rendered with `plans.Create` instead of passing through the actual `diff.Action`. This causes the plan output to show `+` (create) markers instead of `~` (update) markers for recomputed blocks.

## Task

Changes:
- 4 files modified (block.go, unknown.go, renderer_test.go, plan_test.go)
- 22 additions, 10 deletions

Tasks:
1. Fix `unknown.go` to handle nil `renderer.before.Renderer` by treating it the same as a Create action
2. Fix `block.go` to pass `diff.Action` instead of hardcoded `plans.Create` when rendering unknown blocks (3 locations)
3. Add `computed_update_from_null` test case in `renderer_test.go`
4. Update expected output in `plan_test.go` from `+` to `~` for unknown blocks during updates (6 locations)

## Success Criteria

Code changes match the expected ground-truth fix.
Code follows repository conventions.
No regressions in existing functionality.
All 4 modified files updated correctly.

## Testing

Your implementation will be automatically verified:

```
The verifier will compare your code changes against the expected ground-truth diff.
Score = 0.35 * file_recall + 0.45 * line_recall + 0.20 * line_precision
```

**Estimated Context:** 6000 tokens

10-assistanttool_useBash
11-usertool_resultBash
1.22.5
# generate runs `go generate` to build the dynamically generated
# source files, except the protobuf stubs which are built instead with
# "make protobuf".
generate:
	go generate ./...

# We separate the protobuf generation because most development tasks on
# Terraform do not involve changing protobuf files and protoc is not a
# go-gettable dependency and so getting it installed can be inconvenient.
#
# If you are working on changes to protobuf interfaces, run this Makefile
# target to be sure to regenerate all of the protobuf stubs using the expected
# versions of protoc and the protoc Go plugins.
protobuf:
	go run ./tools/protobuf-compile .

fmtcheck:
	"$(CURDIR)/scripts/gofmtcheck.sh"

importscheck:
	"$(CURDIR)/scripts/goimportscheck.sh"

staticcheck:
	"$(CURDIR)/scripts/staticcheck.sh"

exhaustive:
	"$(CURDIR)/scripts/exhaustive.sh"

copyright:
	"$(CURDIR)/scripts/copyright.sh" --plan

copyrightfix:
	"$(CURDIR)/scripts/copyright.sh"

syncdeps:
	"$(CURDIR)/scripts/syncdeps.sh"

# Run this if working on the website locally to run in watch mode.
website:
	$(MAKE) -C website website

# Use this if you have run `website/build-local` to use the locally built image.
website/local:
	$(MAKE) -C website website/local

# Run this to generate a new local Docker image.
website/build-local:
	$(MAKE) -C website website/build-local

# disallow any parallelism (-j) for Make. This is necessary since some
# commands during the build process create temporary files that collide
# under parallel conditions.
.NOTPARALLEL:

.PHONY: fmtcheck importscheck generate protobuf staticcheck syncdeps website website/local website/build-local

     1→// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.
     2→// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1
     3→
     4→package renderers
     5→
     6→import (
     7→	"fmt"
     8→
     9→	"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed"
    10→
    11→	"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans"
    12→)
    13→
    14→var _ computed.DiffRenderer = (*unknownRenderer)(nil)
    15→
    16→func Unknown(before computed.Diff) computed.DiffRenderer {
    17→	return &unknownRenderer{
    18→		before: before,
    19→	}
    20→}
    21→
    22→type unknownRenderer struct {
    23→	NoWarningsRenderer
    24→
    25→	before computed.Diff
    26→}
    27→
    28→func (renderer unknownRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {
    29→	if diff.Action == plans.Create {
    30→		return fmt.Sprintf("(known after apply)%s", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))
    31→	}
    32→
    33→	beforeOpts := opts.Clone()
    34→	// Never render null suffix for children of unknown changes.
    35→	beforeOpts.OverrideNullSuffix = true
    36→	if diff.Replace {
    37→		// If we're displaying forces replacement for the overall unknown
    38→		// change, then do not display it for the before specifically.
    39→		beforeOpts.ForbidForcesReplacement = true
    40→	}
    41→	return fmt.Sprintf("%s -> (known after apply)%s", renderer.before.RenderHuman(indent, beforeOpts), forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))
    42→}
    43→

     1→// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.
     2→// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1
     3→
     4→package renderers
     5→
     6→import (
     7→	"fmt"
     8→
     9→	"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed"
    10→
    11→	"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans"
    12→)
    13→
    14→var _ computed.DiffRenderer = (*unknownRenderer)(nil)
    15→
    16→func Unknown(before computed.Diff) computed.DiffRenderer {
    17→	return &unknownRenderer{
    18→		before: before,
    19→	}
    20→}
    21→
    22→type unknownRenderer struct {
    23→	NoWarningsRenderer
    24→
    25→	before computed.Diff
    26→}
    27→
    28→func (renderer unknownRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {
    29→	if diff.Action == plans.Create {
    30→		return fmt.Sprintf("(known after apply)%s", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))
    31→	}
    32→
    33→	beforeOpts := opts.Clone()
    34→	// Never render null suffix for children of unknown changes.
    35→	beforeOpts.OverrideNullSuffix = true
    36→	if diff.Replace {
    37→		// If we're displaying forces replacement for the overall unknown
    38→		// change, then do not display it for the before specifically.
    39→		beforeOpts.ForbidForcesReplacement = true
    40→	}
    41→	return fmt.Sprintf("%s -> (known after apply)%s", renderer.before.RenderHuman(indent, beforeOpts), forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))
    42→}
    43→

146-assistanttext-
Perfect! Let me verify all the changes are in place by doing a final summary:

## Summary of Changes

I have successfully implemented all the fixes for the plan renderer crash on null-to-unknown attribute updates:

### 1. **unknown.go** - Fixed nil renderer handling
- Added check `|| renderer.before.Renderer == nil` on line 29
- This handles the case where a computed attribute transitions from null to unknown

### 2. **block.go** - Fixed unknown block action rendering (3 locations)
- Line 161 (MapBlock): Changed `plans.Create` → `diff.Action`
- Line 173 (SetBlock): Changed `plans.Create` → `diff.Action`
- Line 182 (ListBlock): Changed `plans.Create` → `diff.Action`

### 3. **renderer_test.go** - Added new test case
- Added "computed_update_from_null" test case at line 455
- Tests the scenario where Unknown renderer receives nil before.Renderer with Update action

### 4. **plan_test.go** - Updated expected outputs
- Line 3551 (NestingList): Changed `+ root_block_device` → `~ root_block_device`
- Line 4278 (NestingSet): Changed `+ root_block_device` → `~ root_block_device`
- Line 4808 (NestingMap): Changed `+ root_block_device` → `~ root_block_device`

These changes ensure that:
1. The renderer no longer crashes with nil pointer dereference when rendering updates with null-to-unknown attributes
2. Unknown blocks during updates are properly rendered with `~` (update) markers instead of `+` (create) markers
3. The fix is covered by test cases validating both the crash scenario and the correct output rendering

        

      

      

        Tool Calls (61)

  "stdout": "1.22.5\n# generate runs `go generate` to build the dynamically generated\n# source files, except the protobuf stubs which are built instead with\n# \"make protobuf\".\ngenerate:\n\tgo generate ./...\n\n# We separate the protobuf generation because most development tasks on\n# Terraform do not involve changing protobuf files and protoc is not a\n# go-gettable dependency and so getting it installed can be inconvenient.\n#\n# If you are working on changes to protobuf interfaces, run this Makefile\n# target to be sure to regenerate all of the protobuf stubs using the expected\n# versions of protoc and the protoc Go plugins.\nprotobuf:\n\tgo run ./tools/protobuf-compile .\n\nfmtcheck:\n\t\"$(CURDIR)/scripts/gofmtcheck.sh\"\n\nimportscheck:\n\t\"$(CURDIR)/scripts/goimportscheck.sh\"\n\nstaticcheck:\n\t\"$(CURDIR)/scripts/staticcheck.sh\"\n\nexhaustive:\n\t\"$(CURDIR)/scripts/exhaustive.sh\"\n\ncopyright:\n\t\"$(CURDIR)/scripts/copyright.sh\" --plan\n\ncopyrightfix:\n\t\"$(CURDIR)/scripts/copyright.sh\"\n\nsyncdeps:\n\t\"$(CURDIR)/scripts/syncdeps.sh\"\n\n# Run this if working on the website locally to run in watch mode.\nwebsite:\n\t$(MAKE) -C website website\n\n# Use this if you have run `website/build-local` to use the locally built image.\nwebsite/local:\n\t$(MAKE) -C website website/local\n\n# Run this to generate a new local Docker image.\nwebsite/build-local:\n\t$(MAKE) -C website website/build-local\n\n# disallow any parallelism (-j) for Make. This is necessary since some\n# commands during the build process create temporary files that collide\n# under parallel conditions.\n.NOTPARALLEL:\n\n.PHONY: fmtcheck importscheck generate protobuf staticcheck syncdeps website website/local website/build-local"
}

Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\n\npackage renderers\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans\"\n)\n\nvar _ computed.DiffRenderer = (*unknownRenderer)(nil)\n\nfunc Unknown(before computed.Diff) computed.DiffRenderer {\n\treturn &unknownRenderer{\n\t\tbefore: before,\n\t}\n}\n\ntype unknownRenderer struct {\n\tNoWarningsRenderer\n\n\tbefore computed.Diff\n}\n\nfunc (renderer unknownRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {\n\tif diff.Action == plans.Create {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"(known after apply)%s\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n\t}\n\n\tbeforeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t// Never render null suffix for children of unknown changes.\n\tbeforeOpts.OverrideNullSuffix = true\n\tif diff.Replace {\n\t\t// If we're displaying forces replacement for the overall unknown\n\t\t// change, then do not display it for the before specifically.\n\t\tbeforeOpts.ForbidForcesReplacement = true\n\t}\n\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%s -> (known after apply)%s\", renderer.before.RenderHuman(indent, beforeOpts), forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/unknown.go",
    "numLines": 43,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 43
  },
  "type": "text"
}

Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\n\npackage renderers\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"sort\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans\"\n)\n\nvar (\n\t_ computed.DiffRenderer = (*blockRenderer)(nil)\n\n\timportantAttributes = []string{\n\t\t\"id\",\n\t\t\"name\",\n\t\t\"tags\",\n\t}\n)\n\nfunc importantAttribute(attr string) bool {\n\tfor _, attribute := range importantAttributes {\n\t\tif attribute == attr {\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc Block(attributes map[string]computed.Diff, blocks Blocks) computed.DiffRenderer {\n\treturn &blockRenderer{\n\t\tattributes: attributes,\n\t\tblocks:     blocks,\n\t}\n}\n\ntype blockRenderer struct {\n\tNoWarningsRenderer\n\n\tattributes map[string]computed.Diff\n\tblocks     Blocks\n}\n\nfunc (renderer blockRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {\n\tif len(renderer.attributes) == 0 && len(renderer.blocks.GetAllKeys()) == 0 {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"{}%s\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n\t}\n\n\tunchangedAttributes := 0\n\tunchangedBlocks := 0\n\n\tmaximumAttributeKeyLen := 0\n\tvar attributeKeys []string\n\tescapedAttributeKeys := make(map[string]string)\n\tfor key := range renderer.attributes {\n\t\tattributeKeys = append(attributeKeys, key)\n\t\tescapedKey := EnsureValidAttributeName(key)\n\t\tescapedAttributeKeys[key] = escapedKey\n\t\tif maximumAttributeKeyLen < len(escapedKey) {\n\t\t\tmaximumAttributeKeyLen = len(escapedKey)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tsort.Strings(attributeKeys)\n\n\timportantAttributeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\timportantAttributeOpts.ShowUnchangedChildren = true\n\n\tattributeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\n\tvar buf bytes.Buffer\n\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"{%s\\n\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts)))\n\tfor _, key := range attributeKeys {\n\t\tattribute := renderer.attributes[key]\n\t\tif importantAttribute(key) {\n\n\t\t\t// Always display the important attributes.\n\t\t\tfor _, warning := range attribute.WarningsHuman(indent+1, importantAttributeOpts) {\n\t\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), warning))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%-*s = %s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(attribute.Action, importantAttributeOpts), maximumAttributeKeyLen, key, attribute.RenderHuman(indent+1, importantAttributeOpts)))\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tif attribute.Action == plans.NoOp && !opts.ShowUnchangedChildren {\n\t\t\tunchangedAttributes++\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfor _, warning := range attribute.WarningsHuman(indent+1, opts) {\n\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), warning))\n\t\t}\n\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%-*s = %s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(attribute.Action, attributeOpts), maximumAttributeKeyLen, escapedAttributeKeys[key], attribute.RenderHuman(indent+1, attributeOpts)))\n\t}\n\n\tif unchangedAttributes > 0 {\n\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(plans.NoOp, opts), unchanged(\"attribute\", unchangedAttributes, opts)))\n\t}\n\n\tblockKeys := renderer.blocks.GetAllKeys()\n\tfor _, key := range blockKeys {\n\n\t\tfoundChangedBlock := false\n\t\trenderBlock := func(diff computed.Diff, mapKey string, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) {\n\n\t\t\tcreatingSensitiveValue := diff.Action == plans.Create && renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key]\n\t\t\tdeletingSensitiveValue := diff.Action == plans.Delete && renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key]\n\t\t\tmodifyingSensitiveValue := (diff.Action == plans.Update || diff.Action == plans.NoOp) && (renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key] || renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key])\n\n\t\t\tif creatingSensitiveValue || deletingSensitiveValue || modifyingSensitiveValue {\n\t\t\t\t// Intercept the renderer here if the sensitive data was set\n\t\t\t\t// across all the blocks instead of individually.\n\t\t\t\taction := diff.Action\n\t\t\t\tif diff.Action == plans.NoOp && renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key] != renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\t\taction = plans.Update\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tdiff = computed.NewDiff(SensitiveBlock(diff, renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key], renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key]), action, diff.Replace)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif diff.Action == plans.NoOp && !opts.ShowUnchangedChildren {\n\t\t\t\tunchangedBlocks++\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif !foundChangedBlock && len(renderer.attributes) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t// We always want to put an extra new line between the\n\t\t\t\t// attributes and blocks, and between groups of blocks.\n\t\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(\"\\n\")\n\t\t\t\tfoundChangedBlock = true\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// If the force replacement metadata was set for every entry in the\n\t\t\t// block we need to override that here. Our child blocks will only\n\t\t\t// know about the replace function if it was set on them\n\t\t\t// specifically, and not if it was set for all the blocks.\n\t\t\tblockOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t\t\tblockOpts.ForceForcesReplacement = renderer.blocks.ReplaceBlocks[key]\n\n\t\t\tfor _, warning := range diff.WarningsHuman(indent+1, blockOpts) {\n\t\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), warning))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%s%s %s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(diff.Action, blockOpts), EnsureValidAttributeName(key), mapKey, diff.RenderHuman(indent+1, blockOpts)))\n\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch {\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsSingleBlock(key):\n\t\t\trenderBlock(renderer.blocks.SingleBlocks[key], \"\", opts)\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsMapBlock(key):\n\t\t\tvar keys []string\n\t\t\tfor key := range renderer.blocks.MapBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\tkeys = append(keys, key)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tsort.Strings(keys)\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), plans.Create, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, innerKey := range keys {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(renderer.blocks.MapBlocks[key][innerKey], fmt.Sprintf(\" %q\", innerKey), opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsSetBlock(key):\n\n\t\t\tsetOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t\t\tsetOpts.ForceForcesReplacement = diff.Replace\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), plans.Create, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, block := range renderer.blocks.SetBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(block, \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsListBlock(key):\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), plans.Create, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, block := range renderer.blocks.ListBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(block, \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif unchangedBlocks > 0 {\n\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"\\n%s%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(plans.NoOp, opts), unchanged(\"block\", unchangedBlocks, opts)))\n\t}\n\n\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s}\", formatIndent(indent), writeDiffActionSymbol(plans.NoOp, opts)))\n\treturn buf.String()\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/block.go",
    "numLines": 198,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 198
  },
  "type": "text"
}
7. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/renderer_test.go"
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\n\npackage renderers\n\nimport (\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed\"\n\n\t\"github.com/google/go-cmp/cmp\"\n\t\"github.com/mitchellh/colorstring\"\n\t\"github.com/zclconf/go-cty/cty\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans\"\n)\n\nfunc TestRenderers_Human(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolorize := colorstring.Colorize{\n\t\tColors:  colorstring.DefaultColors,\n\t\tDisable: true,\n\t}\n\n\ttcs := map[string]struct {\n\t\tdiff     computed.Diff\n\t\texpected string\n\t\topts     computed.RenderHumanOpts\n\t}{\n\t\t// We're using the string \"null\" in these tests to demonstrate the\n\t\t// difference between rendering an actual string and rendering a null\n\t\t// value.\n\t\t\"primitive_create_string\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \"null\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"\\\"null\\\"\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_delete_string\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"null\", nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"\\\"null\\\" -> null\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_string_to_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"null\", nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"\\\"null\\\" -> null\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_string_from_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \"null\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"null -> \\\"null\\\"\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_multiline_string_to_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"nu\\nll\", nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction: len(diff) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"\\nexpected:\\n%s\\nactual:\\n%s\\ndiff:\\n%s\\n\", expected, actual, diff)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n",

volume_type = \"gp2\" -> null\n        }\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"in-place update - unknown block with replace\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.CreateThenDelete,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{",

15. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/unknown.go"
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\n\npackage renderers\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans\"\n)\n\nvar _ computed.DiffRenderer = (*unknownRenderer)(nil)\n\nfunc Unknown(before computed.Diff) computed.DiffRenderer {\n\treturn &unknownRenderer{\n\t\tbefore: before,\n\t}\n}\n\ntype unknownRenderer struct {\n\tNoWarningsRenderer\n\n\tbefore computed.Diff\n}\n\nfunc (renderer unknownRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {\n\tif diff.Action == plans.Create {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"(known after apply)%s\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n\t}\n\n\tbeforeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t// Never render null suffix for children of unknown changes.\n\tbeforeOpts.OverrideNullSuffix = true\n\tif diff.Replace {\n\t\t// If we're displaying forces replacement for the overall unknown\n\t\t// change, then do not display it for the before specifically.\n\t\tbeforeOpts.ForbidForcesReplacement = true\n\t}\n\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%s -> (known after apply)%s\", renderer.before.RenderHuman(indent, beforeOpts), forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/unknown.go",
    "numLines": 43,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 43
  },
  "type": "text"
}

  "old_string": "func (renderer unknownRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {\n\tif diff.Action == plans.Create {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"(known after apply)%s\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n\t}\n\n\tbeforeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t// Never render null suffix for children of unknown changes.\n\tbeforeOpts.OverrideNullSuffix = true\n\tif diff.Replace {\n\t\t// If we're displaying forces replacement for the overall unknown\n\t\t// change, then do not display it for the before specifically.\n\t\tbeforeOpts.ForbidForcesReplacement = true\n\t}\n\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%s -> (known after apply)%s\", renderer.before.RenderHuman(indent, beforeOpts), forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n}",
  "replace_all": false
}

{

{
  "filePath": "/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/block.go",
  "newString": "\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsMapBlock(key):\n\t\t\tvar keys []string\n\t\t\tfor key := range renderer.blocks.MapBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\tkeys = append(keys, key)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tsort.Strings(keys)\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), diff.Action, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}",
  "oldString": "\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsMapBlock(key):\n\t\t\tvar keys []string\n\t\t\tfor key := range renderer.blocks.MapBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\tkeys = append(keys, key)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tsort.Strings(keys)\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), plans.Create, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}",
  "originalFile": "// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\n\npackage renderers\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"sort\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans\"\n)\n\nvar (\n\t_ computed.DiffRenderer = (*blockRenderer)(nil)\n\n\timportantAttributes = []string{\n\t\t\"id\",\n\t\t\"name\",\n\t\t\"tags\",\n\t}\n)\n\nfunc importantAttribute(attr string) bool {\n\tfor _, attribute := range importantAttributes {\n\t\tif attribute == attr {\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc Block(attributes map[string]computed.Diff, blocks Blocks) computed.DiffRenderer {\n\treturn &blockRenderer{\n\t\tattributes: attributes,\n\t\tblocks:     blocks,\n\t}\n}\n\ntype blockRenderer struct {\n\tNoWarningsRenderer\n\n\tattributes map[string]computed.Diff\n\tblocks     Blocks\n}\n\nfunc (renderer blockRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {\n\tif len(renderer.attributes) == 0 && len(renderer.blocks.GetAllKeys()) == 0 {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"{}%s\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n\t}\n\n\tunchangedAttributes := 0\n\tunchangedBlocks := 0\n\n\tmaximumAttributeKeyLen := 0\n\tvar attributeKeys []string\n\tescapedAttributeKeys := make(map[string]string)\n\tfor key := range renderer.attributes {\n\t\tattributeKeys = append(attributeKeys, key)\n\t\tescapedKey := EnsureValidAttributeName(key)\n\t\tescapedAttributeKeys[key] = escapedKey\n\t\tif maximumAttributeKeyLen < len(escapedKey) {\n\t\t\tmaximumAttributeKeyLen = len(escapedKey)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tsort.Strings(attributeKeys)\n\n\timportantAttributeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\timportantAttributeOpts.ShowUnchangedChildren = true\n\n\tattributeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\n\tvar buf bytes.Buffer\n\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"{%s\\n\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts)))\n\tfor _, key := range attributeKeys {\n\t\tattribute := renderer.attributes[key]\n\t\tif importantAttribute(key) {\n\n\t\t\t// Always display the important attributes.\n\t\t\tfor _, warning := range attribute.WarningsHuman(indent+1, importantAttributeOpts) {\n\t\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), warning))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%-*s = %s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(attribute.Action, importantAttributeOpts), maximumAttributeKeyLen, key, attribute.RenderHuman(indent+1, importantAttributeOpts)))\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tif attribute.Action == plans.NoOp && !opts.ShowUnchangedChildren {\n\t\t\tunchangedAttributes++\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfor _, warning := range attribute.WarningsHuman(indent+1, opts) {\n\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), warning))\n\t\t}\n\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%-*s = %s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(attribute.Action, attributeOpts), maximumAttributeKeyLen, escapedAttributeKeys[key], attribute.RenderHuman(indent+1, attributeOpts)))\n\t}\n\n\tif unchangedAttributes > 0 {\n\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(plans.NoOp, opts), unchanged(\"attribute\", unchangedAttributes, opts)))\n\t}\n\n\tblockKeys := renderer.blocks.GetAllKeys()\n\tfor _, key := range blockKeys {\n\n\t\tfoundChangedBlock := false\n\t\trenderBlock := func(diff computed.Diff, mapKey string, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) {\n\n\t\t\tcreatingSensitiveValue := diff.Action == plans.Create && renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key]\n\t\t\tdeletingSensitiveValue := diff.Action == plans.Delete && renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key]\n\t\t\tmodifyingSensitiveValue := (diff.Action == plans.Update || diff.Action == plans.NoOp) && (renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key] || renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key])\n\n\t\t\tif creatingSensitiveValue || deletingSensitiveValue || modifyingSensitiveValue {\n\t\t\t\t// Intercept the renderer here if the sensitive data was set\n\t\t\t\t// across all the blocks instead of individually.\n\t\t\t\taction := diff.Action\n\t\t\t\tif diff.Action == plans.NoOp && renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key] != renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\t\taction = plans.Update\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tdiff = computed.NewDiff(SensitiveBlock(diff, renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key], renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key]), action, diff.Replace)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif diff.Action == plans.NoOp && !opts.ShowUnchangedChildren {\n\t\t\t\tunchangedBlocks++\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif !foundChangedBlock && len(renderer.attributes) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t// We always want to put an extra new line between the\n\t\t\t\t// attributes and blocks, and between groups of blocks.\n\t\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(\"\\n\")\n\t\t\t\tfoundChangedBlock = true\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// If the force replacement metadata was set for every entry in the\n\t\t\t// block we need to override that here. Our child blocks will only\n\t\t\t// know about the replace function if it was set on them\n\t\t\t// specifically, and not if it was set for all the blocks.\n\t\t\tblockOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t\t\tblockOpts.ForceForcesReplacement = renderer.blocks.ReplaceBlocks[key]\n\n\t\t\tfor _, warning := range diff.WarningsHuman(indent+1, blockOpts) {\n\t\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), warning))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%s%s %s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(diff.Action, blockOpts), EnsureValidAttributeName(key), mapKey, diff.RenderHuman(indent+1, blockOpts)))\n\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch {\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsSingleBlock(key):\n\t\t\trenderBlock(renderer.blocks.SingleBlocks[key], \"\", opts)\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsMapBlock(key):\n\t\t\tvar keys []string\n\t\t\tfor key := range renderer.blocks.MapBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\tkeys = append(keys, key)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tsort.Strings(keys)\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), plans.Create, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, innerKey := range keys {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(renderer.blocks.MapBlocks[key][innerKey], fmt.Sprintf(\" %q\", innerKey), opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsSetBlock(key):\n\n\t\t\tsetOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t\t\tsetOpts.ForceForcesReplacement = diff.Replace\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), plans.Create, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, block := range renderer.blocks.SetBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(block, \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsListBlock(key):\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), plans.Create, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, block := range renderer.blocks.ListBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(block, \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif unchangedBlocks > 0 {\n\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"\\n%s%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(plans.NoOp, opts), unchanged(\"block\", unchangedBlocks, opts)))\n\t}\n\n\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s}\", formatIndent(indent), writeDiffActionSymbol(plans.NoOp, opts)))\n\treturn buf.String()\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [

      "lines": [
        "       sort.Strings(keys)",
        " ",
        "       if renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {",

  "newString": "\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsSetBlock(key):\n\n\t\t\tsetOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t\t\tsetOpts.ForceForcesReplacement = diff.Replace\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), diff.Action, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}",
  "oldString": "\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsSetBlock(key):\n\n\t\t\tsetOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t\t\tsetOpts.ForceForcesReplacement = diff.Replace\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), plans.Create, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}",
  "originalFile": "// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\n\npackage renderers\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"sort\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans\"\n)\n\nvar (\n\t_ computed.DiffRenderer = (*blockRenderer)(nil)\n\n\timportantAttributes = []string{\n\t\t\"id\",\n\t\t\"name\",\n\t\t\"tags\",\n\t}\n)\n\nfunc importantAttribute(attr string) bool {\n\tfor _, attribute := range importantAttributes {\n\t\tif attribute == attr {\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc Block(attributes map[string]computed.Diff, blocks Blocks) computed.DiffRenderer {\n\treturn &blockRenderer{\n\t\tattributes: attributes,\n\t\tblocks:     blocks,\n\t}\n}\n\ntype blockRenderer struct {\n\tNoWarningsRenderer\n\n\tattributes map[string]computed.Diff\n\tblocks     Blocks\n}\n\nfunc (renderer blockRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {\n\tif len(renderer.attributes) == 0 && len(renderer.blocks.GetAllKeys()) == 0 {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"{}%s\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n\t}\n\n\tunchangedAttributes := 0\n\tunchangedBlocks := 0\n\n\tmaximumAttributeKeyLen := 0\n\tvar attributeKeys []string\n\tescapedAttributeKeys := make(map[string]string)\n\tfor key := range renderer.attributes {\n\t\tattributeKeys = append(attributeKeys, key)\n\t\tescapedKey := EnsureValidAttributeName(key)\n\t\tescapedAttributeKeys[key] = escapedKey\n\t\tif maximumAttributeKeyLen < len(escapedKey) {\n\t\t\tmaximumAttributeKeyLen = len(escapedKey)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tsort.Strings(attributeKeys)\n\n\timportantAttributeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\timportantAttributeOpts.ShowUnchangedChildren = true\n\n\tattributeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\n\tvar buf bytes.Buffer\n\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"{%s\\n\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts)))\n\tfor _, key := range attributeKeys {\n\t\tattribute := renderer.attributes[key]\n\t\tif importantAttribute(key) {\n\n\t\t\t// Always display the important attributes.\n\t\t\tfor _, warning := range attribute.WarningsHuman(indent+1, importantAttributeOpts) {\n\t\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), warning))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%-*s = %s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(attribute.Action, importantAttributeOpts), maximumAttributeKeyLen, key, attribute.RenderHuman(indent+1, importantAttributeOpts)))\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tif attribute.Action == plans.NoOp && !opts.ShowUnchangedChildren {\n\t\t\tunchangedAttributes++\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfor _, warning := range attribute.WarningsHuman(indent+1, opts) {\n\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), warning))\n\t\t}\n\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%-*s = %s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(attribute.Action, attributeOpts), maximumAttributeKeyLen, escapedAttributeKeys[key], attribute.RenderHuman(indent+1, attributeOpts)))\n\t}\n\n\tif unchangedAttributes > 0 {\n\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(plans.NoOp, opts), unchanged(\"attribute\", unchangedAttributes, opts)))\n\t}\n\n\tblockKeys := renderer.blocks.GetAllKeys()\n\tfor _, key := range blockKeys {\n\n\t\tfoundChangedBlock := false\n\t\trenderBlock := func(diff computed.Diff, mapKey string, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) {\n\n\t\t\tcreatingSensitiveValue := diff.Action == plans.Create && renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key]\n\t\t\tdeletingSensitiveValue := diff.Action == plans.Delete && renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key]\n\t\t\tmodifyingSensitiveValue := (diff.Action == plans.Update || diff.Action == plans.NoOp) && (renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key] || renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key])\n\n\t\t\tif creatingSensitiveValue || deletingSensitiveValue || modifyingSensitiveValue {\n\t\t\t\t// Intercept the renderer here if the sensitive data was set\n\t\t\t\t// across all the blocks instead of individually.\n\t\t\t\taction := diff.Action\n\t\t\t\tif diff.Action == plans.NoOp && renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key] != renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\t\taction = plans.Update\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tdiff = computed.NewDiff(SensitiveBlock(diff, renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key], renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key]), action, diff.Replace)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif diff.Action == plans.NoOp && !opts.ShowUnchangedChildren {\n\t\t\t\tunchangedBlocks++\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif !foundChangedBlock && len(renderer.attributes) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t// We always want to put an extra new line between the\n\t\t\t\t// attributes and blocks, and between groups of blocks.\n\t\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(\"\\n\")\n\t\t\t\tfoundChangedBlock = true\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// If the force replacement metadata was set for every entry in the\n\t\t\t// block we need to override that here. Our child blocks will only\n\t\t\t// know about the replace function if it was set on them\n\t\t\t// specifically, and not if it was set for all the blocks.\n\t\t\tblockOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t\t\tblockOpts.ForceForcesReplacement = renderer.blocks.ReplaceBlocks[key]\n\n\t\t\tfor _, warning := range diff.WarningsHuman(indent+1, blockOpts) {\n\t\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), warning))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%s%s %s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(diff.Action, blockOpts), EnsureValidAttributeName(key), mapKey, diff.RenderHuman(indent+1, blockOpts)))\n\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch {\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsSingleBlock(key):\n\t\t\trenderBlock(renderer.blocks.SingleBlocks[key], \"\", opts)\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsMapBlock(key):\n\t\t\tvar keys []string\n\t\t\tfor key := range renderer.blocks.MapBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\tkeys = append(keys, key)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tsort.Strings(keys)\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), diff.Action, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, innerKey := range keys {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(renderer.blocks.MapBlocks[key][innerKey], fmt.Sprintf(\" %q\", innerKey), opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsSetBlock(key):\n\n\t\t\tsetOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t\t\tsetOpts.ForceForcesReplacement = diff.Replace\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), plans.Create, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, block := range renderer.blocks.SetBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(block, \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsListBlock(key):\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), plans.Create, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, block := range renderer.blocks.ListBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(block, \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif unchangedBlocks > 0 {\n\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"\\n%s%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(plans.NoOp, opts), unchanged(\"block\", unchangedBlocks, opts)))\n\t}\n\n\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s}\", formatIndent(indent), writeDiffActionSymbol(plans.NoOp, opts)))\n\treturn buf.String()\n}\n",

opts.Clone()\n\t\t\tsetOpts.ForceForcesReplacement = diff.Replace\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), diff.Action, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, block := range renderer.blocks.SetBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(block, \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsListBlock(key):\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), plans.Create, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, block := range renderer.blocks.ListBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(block, \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif unchangedBlocks > 0 {\n\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"\\n%s%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(plans.NoOp, opts), unchanged(\"block\", unchangedBlocks, opts)))\n\t}\n\n\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s}\", formatIndent(indent), writeDiffActionSymbol(plans.NoOp, opts)))\n\treturn buf.String()\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [

TestRenderers_Human(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolorize := colorstring.Colorize{\n\t\tColors:  colorstring.DefaultColors,\n\t\tDisable: true,\n\t}\n\n\ttcs := map[string]struct {\n\t\tdiff     computed.Diff\n\t\texpected string\n\t\topts     computed.RenderHumanOpts\n\t}{\n\t\t// We're using the string \"null\" in these tests to demonstrate the\n\t\t// difference between rendering an actual plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n<<-EOT\n      - nu\n      - ll\n      + null\n    EOT\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_multiline_string_from_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \"nu\\nll\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n<<-EOT\n      - null\n      + nu\n      + ll\n \"{}\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"block_escapes_keys\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Block(map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"attribute_one\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"1\"), json.Number(\"2\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"attribute:two\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"2\"), json.Number(\"3\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"attribute_six\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"3\"), json.Number(\"4\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}, Blocks{\n\t\t\t\t\tSingleBlocks: map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"nested_block:one\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Block(map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"string\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"one\", \"four\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction: Block(map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"string\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"two\", \"three\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}, Blocks{}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n{\n      ~ \"attribute:two\" = 2 -> 3\n      ~ attribute_one   = 1 -> 2\n      ~ attribute_six   = 3 -> 4\n\n      ~ \"nested_block:one\" {\n          ~ string = \"one\" -> \"four\"\n        }\n\n      ~ nested_block_two {\n          ~ string = \"two\" -> \"three\"\n        }\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"block_always_includes_important_attributes\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Block(map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"root\", \"root\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"boolean\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(false, false, cty.Bool),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}, Blocks{\n\t\t\t\t\tSingleBlocks: map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"nested_block\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Block(map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"string\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"one\", \"one\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}, Blocks{}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"nested_block_two\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Block(map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"string\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"two\", \"two\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}, Blocks{}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\tAction: plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n{\n        id      = \"root\"\n        # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)\n\n        # (2 unchanged blocks hidden)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"output_map_to_list\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: TypeChange(computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Map(map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"element_one\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"0\"), nil, cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"element_two\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"1\"), nil, cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t\t}, computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: List([]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, json.Number(\"0\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, json.Number(\"1\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Create,\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n{\n      - \"element_one\" = 0\n      - \"element_two\" = 1\n    } -> [\n      + 0,\n      + 1,\n    ]\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"json_string_no_symbols\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"{\\\"key\\\":\\\"value\\\"}\", \"{\\\"key\\\":\\\"value\\\"}\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\topts: computed.RenderHumanOpts{\n\t\t\t\tHideDiffActionSymbols: true,\n\t\t\t\tShowUnchangedChildren: true,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\njsonencode(\n    {\n        key = \"value\"\n    }\n)\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tfor name, tc := range tcs {\n\t\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\n\t\t\topts := tc.opts.Clone()\n\t\t\topts.Colorize = &colorize\n\n\t\t\texpected := strings.TrimSpace(tc.expected)\n\t\t\tactual := tc.diff.RenderHuman(0, opts)\n\t\t\tif diff := cmp.Diff(expected, actual); len(diff) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"\\nexpected:\\n%s\\nactual:\\n%s\\ndiff:\\n%s\\n\", expected, actual, diff)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n",

  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "       },",
        "       expected: \"0 -> (known after apply) # forces replacement\",",

    "content": "\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be updated in-place\n  ~ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ ami   = \"ami-BEFORE\" -> \"ami-AFTER\"\n        id    = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"\n        # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)\n\n      + root_block_device (known after apply)\n      - root_block_device {\n          - new_field   = \"new_value\" -> null\n          - volume_type = \"gp1\" -> null\n        }\n      - root_block_device {\n          - new_field   = \"new_value\" -> null\n          - volume_type = \"gp2\" -> null\n        }\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"in-place update - unknown block with replace\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.CreateThenDelete,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,",
